title: Legends Awoken
description: Legends Awoken throws you into a world where forgotten myths awaken and ancient powers reshape the land. Magic flows through every corner, mysterious structures rise from the earth, and terrifying bosses guard treasures beyond imagination.
body:
Legends Awoken throws you into a world where forgotten myths awaken and ancient powers reshape the land. Magic flows through every corner, mysterious structures rise from the earth, and terrifying bosses guard treasures beyond imagination.

Forge your path as a mage, warrior, or adventurer, uncover powerful artifacts, and challenge creatures pulled from legend itself. Every dungeon, every spell, every battle feels like a step into a story long lost — now being written again, by you.

⚠️ Note: This modpack is still in development, so expect new adventures, bosses, and magical surprises to appear as it grows! Grab your friends and lend each other a hand — teamwork makes facing legendary foes even more epic
